response: Sugar Ray gained mainstream fame in the 1990s, as evidenced by their success with the song "Fly" from the 1997 album "Floored," which led the band to adopt a mainstream, pop music style. Against the Current, on the other hand, gained mainstream fame in the mid-to-late 1990s as well, but they are an American pop rock band formed in 2011 and do not share the same historical context or timeline as Sugar Ray.
